title: PvP ZeusDelfin
description: PvP ZeusDelfin is a near-vanilla resource pack designed specifically to improve PvP clarity and focus.
body:
PvP ZeusDelfin is a clean, ultra-vanilla resource pack built specifically for PvP players who want the pure Minecraft look — with only the smallest, most essential tweaks needed for clarity in combat.

This pack does not redesign weapons, armor, or core textures. Everything stays true to the original game. Only a handful of minimal adjustments are made where they meaningfully improve PvP readability, such as:

Slightly clearer UI elements

No custom swords.
No stylized armor.
No altered blocks.
Just a near-vanilla PvP experience optimized for focus and visibility.

Why this pack?

⚡ Extremely lightweight

🎯 Near-vanilla visuals

👁 Only essential clarity improvements

🔧 Fully compatible with shaders & other packs

🧱 Keeps the original Minecraft feel 100% intact

Design Philosophy

This pack exists to support your PvP performance without changing how Minecraft looks. It’s meant to feel like pure vanilla, just slightly sharper where it matters.

Permissions

You may use parts of this pack in your own projects as long as you credit Hardcore Plus PvP Pack in the description.
